abilities.scope: any authenticated tenant user
tenant-scoped row (BelongsToTenant global scope handles isolation)
admin + design-role
admin + design-role — creating rows only; tokens_snapshot is IMMUTABLE while active
admin + design-role — triggers ThemeActivated + CSS regen
any authenticated tenant user — dry-run render, no persistence
admin + design-role — refused while is_active=true (must deactivate first)
any authenticated tenant user — sees platform presets (tenant_id NULL) + tenant custom presets
platform preset visible to every tenant; tenant custom scoped by BelongsToTenant
admin + design-role — tenant custom presets only (tenant_id != null)
platform_admin guard — Stackra staff only. Writes tenant_id NULL rows.
admin + design-role — mutates tenant custom preset only. Platform presets require platform.theme.manage-presets.
admin + design-role — clones ANY preset (platform or tenant custom) into a new tenant custom preset. Gated by theme_custom_presets entitlement cap.
admin + design-role — flips is_active false → true (fires ThemePresetPublished)
admin + design-role for tenant custom; platform_admin required for platform presets. Refused when any Theme.selected_preset_id references this preset AND that Theme is active.
any authenticated tenant user
tenant-scoped via BelongsToTenant
admin + design-role — gated by theme_token_overrides entitlement cap
admin + design-role
admin + design-role — falls through to underlying preset value on next resolution

policies.note: Policy is authored here even though the underlying row (user_theme_preferences) lives in the user module. Theme is the resolver.

abilities.scope: user reads their own preference row (auto-provisioned on first read)
user updates their own preferred_mode + accessibility_overrides
